schema.variant_semantics: independent variants; sizes are not assumed to be nested supersets
schema.display_contract: Markdown renders terms only; JSON carries metadata.

couplings.unsafe_use: Bare 'narrow next' as vibe, conclusion, or authority without a probe/receipt/status.
